name: @ixo/ns
description: IXO Namespace — JSON-LD contexts, vocabularies, SKOS concept schemes, JSON Schemas and SHACL shapes for the IXO Spatial Web. Published at https://w3id.org/ixo/*.

scripts.validate: node scripts/validate.mjs && node scripts/validate-schemas.mjs && node scripts/validate-shapes.mjs && node scripts/validate-skos.mjs && node scripts/validate-vocab.mjs && node scripts/validate-resources.mjs
